listitem.para: cmake_minimum_required (VERSION 3.4) project(VisionVoyager) set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17) set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON) find_package(OpenCV REQUIRED) find_package(QT NAMES Qt6 Qt5 REQUIRED COMPONENTS Widgets Core Gui Multimedia MultimediaWidgets Quick Charts) find_package(Qt$

REQUIRED COMPONENTS Widgets Core Gui Multimedia MultimediaWidgets Quick Charts find_package (pybind11 REQUIRED) find_package(OpenXLSX REQUIRED) add_subdirectory(VisionVoyagerMoves) add_subdirectory(RouteRegistration) add_subdirectory(RouteRecordPlayer) add_subdirectory(KeyboardControl) add_subdirectory(LineFollower) add_subdirectory(ObstacleAvoidance) add_subdirectory(CameraModule) add_subdirectory(VoiceRecognition) add_subdirectory(TextToSpeech) add_subdirectory(ApplicationModule) add_subdirectory(VisionVoyagerGUI) add_subdirectory(RFID) set(Pocketsphinx_LIBRARY_DIRS "/home/kovaiu1/SRE/pocketsphinx/build") set(Pocketsphinx_LIBRARIES "$

libpocketsphinx a set (POCKETSPHINX_INCLUDE_DIRS "/home/kovaiu1/SRE/pocketsphinx/include") set(OpenXLSX_DIR "~/OpenXLSX/build") add_executable(VisionVoyager mainApplication.cpp) target_include_directories(VisionVoyagerGUI PRIVATE/usr/include/arm-linux-gnueabihf/qt5 $

section.title: Function Documentation

para.computeroutput: REQUIRED COMPONENTS Widgets Core Gui Multimedia MultimediaWidgets Quick Charts find_package (pybind11 REQUIRED)

libpocketsphinx a set (POCKETSPHINX_INCLUDE_DIRS "/home/kovaiu1/SRE/pocketsphinx/include" )Here is the caller graph for this function:
